instruction:
A mobile plan charges a base monthly fee of \$25.00 for the first 500 minutes of air time plus a charge of \$0.65 for each additional minute. Write a piecewise-defined linear function which calculates the monthly cost $C$ (in dollars) for using $m$ minutes of air time.
$\begin{array}{cccc}\hline &  C(m)=\left\lbrace \begin{array}{cc} &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ &\\ \end{array}\right. & & [ANS]if [ANS] \leq m \leq [ANS] [ANS]if m > [ANS] \\ \hline \end{array}$
